title: Possibility to Create columns or automatizations in many boards at same time

posts.author: a.mooser (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hallo,

i am looking for the possibility to “batch” change / update multiple boards.

Use case: We use one board per Project. If new functionality is needed it shall be added to all existing Project boards (like New Colum for additional data or automatization to link boards if there is a specific trigger) and not only to new created (from templates).

Is there any functionality to make this quicker instead of updating 150+ Boards?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Nope, and multiple requests are posted to make this happen (as old as 2019).
